channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] TRAFFIC ALERT: Cypress Gardens Blvd. in Winter Haven partially closed after semi-truck crash
item.description: Winter Haven Police said all eastbound lanes of Cypress Gardens Blvd are shut down after a semi-truck crash.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Dangerous wildfire smoke chokes Midwest and Northeast
item.description: Wildfires in Canada forced thousands to evacuate Minnesota’s Boundary Waters as dangerous smoke and extreme heat spread across the Midwest and Northeast.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Carry-on costs
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises travelers to compare the full cost of flights, including baggage and seat fees, before booking.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 16
item.description: Nurse practitioner gives produce safety tips during outbreak. Plus, woman accused of putting newborn baby in trash can at UT out on bond.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Stock market rally fueled by transportation stocks and AI excitement on Wall Street
item.description: Transportation stocks and AI are fueling a Wall Street rally, but experts say long-term planning matters more than chasing trends.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa towing company sued over $250 fee charged before county's required 48-hour waiting period
item.description: A proposed class-action lawsuit alleges a Tampa towing company repeatedly charged drivers a $250 fee in violation of a Hillsborough County ordinance and that more than 1,000 people may have been affected.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] 9-foot alligator cools off in pool of Venice home
item.description: A Venice homeowner got quite the wake-up call when a 9-foot, 4-inch alligator pushed through the home’s screened enclosure before taking an early morning dip in the pool, according to the Venice Police Department.

item.title: [Tampa Bay Beacon (Pinellas)] Lakewood High caps three-year turnaround effort with A grade

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Man arrested for St. Pete attempted murder after attacking, disfiguring victim: SPPD
item.description: St. Petersburg police have charged a man with attempted murder on Tuesday after attacking and disfiguring the victim at Bartlett Park, authorities said.

[WFLA News Channel 8] US airstrikes hit northern Iran as it disables ship trying to run the blockade
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — The United States intensified its strikes targeting Iran early Thursday, hitting targets further north as American forces also fired into a ship it accused of trying to break its naval blockade on the Islamic Republic. Iran retaliated with missile and drone fire targeting Bahrain and Kuwait before dawn. Days [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] South Tampa road depression slows traffic
item.description: Traffic is slowing near a busy South Tampa intersection after a possible road depression was reported.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Pinellas schools consolidation: District seeks input on empty seats
item.description: Pinellas County Schools is looking for community feedback as declining enrollment forces the district to plan another round of school consolidations. District leaders stress that these changes are necessary to keep local programs financially sustainable.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Florida data center freeze: Pasco County joins regional moratoriums on tech growth
item.description: Pasco County leaders enacted a one-year temporary ban on new data centers Tuesday to investigate how the massive computer facilities impact neighborhood resources and utility grids.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Powerball, Lotto, Fantasy 5 results for July 15, 2026
